name: ORAMED PHARMACEUTICALS INC.
business: Oramed Pharmaceuticals Inc. is a pharmaceutical company engaged in the research and development of innovative pharmaceutical solutions with a technology platform that allows for the oral delivery of therapeutic proteins. The company also allocates capital to strategic investments in healthcare and life sciences companies that complement its long-term business objectives.
sellsTo: Not applicable; the company has no commercialized products, only a license agreement with HTIT generating revenue.

exposures.sentence: We are a pharmaceutical company engaged in the research and development of innovative pharmaceutical solutions with a technology platform that allows for the oral delivery of therapeutic proteins.
Lifeward is a medical device company, and its ability to generate value depends largely on the successful development, regulatory approval, and commercialization of its products.
On November 7, 2024, our Board approved investments of up to $10,000,000 in real estate assets, and additional investments of up to $20,000,000 On February 13, 2025.
In addition, we allocate capital to strategic investments in healthcare and life sciences companies that we believe complement our long-term business objectives and technology focus.

catalysts.event: Closing of Lifeward Share Purchase Agreement and acquisition of OraTech
catalysts.sentence: The closing of the Share Purchase Transaction took place on March 25, 2026.
